dialogos.texto_en: Everyone said that we'd all be rivals, right?
Yeah, that's right, Ichika.
We're neither enemies nor allies.\nWe're rivals.
Thank you, everyone.
*sigh*\nI can't believe you went to all this trouble of adding \nmore rivals when you're such a softy, aren't you?
But Ichika.\nI've sensed your determination.
But, you know, I'm going to be the one he picks.
No. Me.
You say that now, but how do you know \nyou won't regret it later?
I won't lose.
Yeah, yeah!\nNow it's up to Uesugi-san.
Yes. In the end,\nit's up to him to decide.
But if he chooses someone,\nhow will Uesugi-san give his answer?
That's obvious.\nA confession. C-O-N-F-E-S-S-I-O-N!
A c-confession...!
I think that's his intention.\nAlthough, he might be hesitating about when to do it.
Well... Since we came all the way to Okinawa,\nmaybe it'll be while we're looking at the ocean?
On a white sandy beach, watching the sunset together,\nwith Futaro gently placing his hand\non my shoulder...!
Yeah, yeah. Cut it out with the delusions.
Expecting that much from Uesugi-kun might be tough.
Do you think so? If we create the right atmosphere,\nhe might unexpectedly say it.
That's true.\nWe might have to do something like that\nto get him to confess.
Futaro is weak to pressure.\nOnce we create the right atmosphere, \nthat'll give him that push he needs.
Ohhh, Miku's eyes are serious.
...Is that really going to work?
He has once run away from our determination.\nMaybe we shouldn't have too high of expectations.
You really are strict, Itsuki-chan.
Well, it's just that I feel like everyone is being so...
Don't worry. Futaro should understand that too.
I trust Fu-kun.
Hmm.\nI wonder if I should do something for everyone's sake.
Anyway, it's up to Fu-kun now.\nWe'll do what we can do.
Okay.
Well then, let's go back to where Futaro is.\nHe's probably lonely.
